category_title: Preschool students engaging in disruptive behavior to obtain attention and escape group activities
scenario_title: Reading a book during circle time
minimal_context: Ms. Beth is reading a book to the class during circle time.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: (Opens a circle time book and begins to read) Alright everyone, let's sit quietly while I read our story for today.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Makes an animal noise and starts shouting) I can’t see the book!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: (Sits next to Delon) Please sit still and be quiet.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Hums a song and pretends to touch the peer sitting in front of him)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Delon, be quiet and look at the book.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: (Opens a circle time book and begins to read) Alright everyone, let's sit quietly while I read our story for today.

STUDENT: (Makes an animal noise and starts shouting) I can’t see the book!

TUTOR: (Sits next to Delon) Please sit still and be quiet.

STUDENT: (Hums a song and pretends to touch the peer sitting in front of him)

TUTOR: Delon, be quiet and look at the book.

STUDENT: (Shouts) this is boring!
